description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, octagonal base for stability. The cone features two broad, white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, enhancing its visibility in low-light conditions. The surface of the cone appears to be made of flexible, durable plastic, likely PVC or rubber, with a slightly textured finish for grip. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, tapering smoothly to a point without any attachments or openings. The base is thick and robust, designed to prevent tipping and to withstand outdoor urban environments. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible, and the cone appears to be in new or excellent condition with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two wide white reflective stripes and a sturdy, octagonal base. The cone is made of flexible plastic and appears new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, both reflective stripes, and the wide, stable base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth taper of the cone and the even spacing of the reflective stripes.
description_view_2: Another angled view displaying the cone's rounded tip and the octagonal shape of the base.
description_view_3: Rear view with both reflective stripes visible and the base's thickness clearly shown.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height. Both stripes are of equal width and are highly visible.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, and thick, made of sturdy material for stability. It appears slightly textured and robust to prevent tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone.
attribute_condition: The cone appears new and clean, with no visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
